content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative refinement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to eliminate blind spots in self-feedback, creating a hybrid self-improvement pipeline that retains the original advantage of no extra training or supervision. This hybrid approach would address the common failure mode of standard Self-Refine where an LLM repeats the same incorrect assumption across all iterations because it never challenges its own initial perspective.
